title: Interactive Quick Look preview
description: Wire Stop/Approve buttons in the QL SwiftUI card to JobCardHost via jobcard:// URL scheme so clicks dispatch jc commands.

subtasks.title: Register jobcard:// scheme in JobCardHost Info.plist
Handle URLs in JobCardHostApp.swift → exec jc commands
Wire Stop and Approve buttons in PreviewViewController to open URLs
Remove sandbox entitlement from JobCardHost so it can exec jc
Add Approve button when meta.decision_required == true
